description: No documented Operational Control Plan exists for core production processes. No procedural checklists current for standard shift handovers.
remediation: Draft and approve DOC-007 (Operational Control Plan). Conduct Clause 8 competency training for all operators.

clause_title: Control of Externally Provided Processes, Products and Services
description: Annual evaluation audits of high-risk suppliers are 18 months overdue. No valid assessment records since Q3 2024.
remediation: Execute supplier checklist audits for top-5 strategic vendors. Reactivate DOC-005 evaluation guidelines immediately.

description: IT Security Policy (DOC-003) remains in draft status with no evidence of formal review or top management approval.
remediation: Schedule management review for DOC-003. Obtain formal approval and update document status to approved.

description: Training effectiveness evaluation methodology not consistently applied across departments. Results not formally recorded.
remediation: Develop standardised training effectiveness evaluation form. Roll out across all department heads.

description: IT service availability KPIs have not been monitored or included in management review inputs for Q3 and Q4 2025.
remediation: Establish KPI dashboard for IT availability metrics. Include in next management review agenda.
